sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106302" key="u(dato/klustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδᾰτό-κλυστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n106302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">washed with water only</tr_> (without soap), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.134e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
